name: knowledge_lifecycle
description: Knowledge recording and lifecycle workflow. Classify → write → check promote.

nodes.description: Classify incoming knowledge: official doc → skills/external, inference → dynamic. Read checklist and report classification basis.
nodes.instruction: Read checklist: shared/workflows/checklists/knowledge_lifecycle__classify_knowledge.yaml. Classification rules: (1) Official doc / user-confirmed fact → .claude/skills-on-demand/ (走 /promote 升級路徑); (2) Inference / single case / observed pattern → kb.py add-learning (DB is source of truth; dynamic/*.md are auto-generated exports). Complete with either `checklist_responses` or compact `{"summary":"<classification basis>"}` for this single-item checklist.

nodes.description: Write knowledge to kb_index.db via kb.py (source of truth). M2 validator checks status field in DB, not .md marker.
nodes.instruction: For decisions: bash shared/tools/conda-python.sh shared/tools/kb.py add-decision --id D-NNN --project <PROJECT_ID|system|ai-office|shared> ... For learnings: bash shared/tools/conda-python.sh shared/tools/kb.py add-learning --id <prefix>-LNN --project <PROJECT_ID|system|ai-office|shared> --title '...' --date YYYY-MM-DD --content '...' --confidence high|medium|low [--status draft|active|mature|promoted|stale|archived]. EVO-016: kb.py writes DB only; .md export refreshed by post_task refresh_kb_exports node or `kb.py export all`. When completing this node, pass `kb_entry_ids` in outputs so M2 validator checks the exact DB rows written this round.

required_outputs.description: KB entry ids written to DB

nodes.description: Sync dynamic KB changes to kb_index.db after writing
nodes.instruction: Run: bash shared/tools/conda-python.sh shared/tools/kb.py build-edges. This updates knowledge graph edges after new nodes added. Optionally: bash shared/tools/conda-python.sh shared/tools/kb.py validate --warn-exit-zero to check consistency.

nodes.description: Check if dynamic KB has enough validated entries to suggest /promote
nodes.instruction: Run: bash shared/tools/conda-python.sh shared/tools/kb.py catalog. If dynamic/ has ≥5 entries with status:active and confidence:high, suggest user run /promote for skill upgrade review.
